Class Archer

java.lang.Object
component.Unit
component.heroes.Heroes
component.heroes.Archer
public class Archer extends Heroes
Archer hero class.

The Archer is a scaling damage dealer that builds up bowStack to increase ultimate damage. The Archer's ultimate damage also increases when the Archer has lower HP (missing HP bonus).

Base Stats:

  • Attack: 50
  • Max HP: 270
  • Defense: 5

Stacks:

  • bowStack starts at 1
  • Increases up to 5 via skill(Target)
  • Resets back to 1 after ultimate(Target)

Cooldowns:

  • Skill: 0 turns
  • Ultimate: 0 turns

  • Field Details

    • bowStack

      private int bowStack
      Current bow stack (1–5). Higher stacks increase ultimate damage.

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • normalAttack

      public void normalAttack(Unit target)
      Performs a normal attack using the hero's effective attack value.
      Specified by:
      normalAttack in class Heroes
      Parameters:
      target - target unit to attack

    • skill

      public void skill(Target target)
      Uses the Archer's skill ability.

      Skill effect: Increases bowStack by 1 up to a maximum of 5.

      Specified by:
      skill in class Heroes
      Parameters:
      target - wrapper containing targets (not used by this skill)

    • ultimate

      public void ultimate(Target target)
      Uses the Archer's ultimate ability.

      Ultimate effect:

      • Computes total damage based on bowStack, effective attack
      • Splits the total damage evenly among all selected targets
      • Resets bowStack back to 1 after execution

      Damage formula

       totalDamage = bowStack * effectiveAtk()*( (10.00 + targets.size()) /10.00)
 damagePerTarget = totalDamage / numberOfTargets
      Specified by:
      ultimate in class Heroes
      Parameters:
      target - wrapper containing multiple targets

    • resetBow

      public void resetBow()
      Resets bowStack back to 1.

    • increaseBowStack

      public void increaseBowStack()
      Increases bowStack by 1 up to a maximum of 5.

    • getBowStack

      public int getBowStack()
      Returns current bow stack value.
      Returns:
      bowStack (1–5)

    • castSkill

      public void castSkill(SkillType type, Target target)
      Dispatches skill execution based on skill type.
      Overrides:
      castSkill in class Unit
      Parameters:
      type - type of skill to execute
      target - target wrapper containing selected unit(s)
